LanguageData.Ammo_ME.label: Basic Thermal clip
LanguageData.Ammo_ME.description: Thermal clips designed to fit almost all mass accelerator weapons. It allows mass accelerator weapons to fire continuously without needing to slow down in order to cool. It is best not to question where the projectile itself comes from.
LanguageData.Ammo_ME_AP.label: AP Thermal clip
LanguageData.Ammo_ME_AP.description: Thermal clips designed to fit almost all mass accelerator weapons. This one penetrates armour better.
LanguageData.Ammo_ME_Cryo.label: Cryo Thermal clip
LanguageData.Ammo_ME_Cryo.description: Thermal clips designed to fit almost all mass accelerator weapons. This one makes your enemy slow and cumberson.
LanguageData.Ammo_ME_HE.label: HE Thermal clip
LanguageData.Ammo_ME_HE.description: Thermal clips designed to fit almost all mass accelerator weapons.
LanguageData.Ammo_ME_FI.label: incendiary Thermal clip
LanguageData.Ammo_ME_FI.description: Thermal clips designed to fit almost all mass accelerator weapons. Set enemy on fire.
LanguageData.Ammo_ME_Ion.label: Disruptor Thermal clip
LanguageData.Ammo_ME_Ion.description: Thermal clips designed to fit almost all mass accelerator weapons. This one makes your enemy combust.
LanguageData.Ammo_ME_Toxic.label: Toxin Thermal clip
LanguageData.Ammo_ME_Toxic.description: Thermal clips designed to fit almost all mass accelerator weapons.
LanguageData.Fragment_ME.label: small fragments
LanguageData.VFE_Bullet_ML77CE.label: ML77 Missile
